name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W213/S213, C238 (4.0L V8 twin-turbo petrol, AMG)

serviceNotes.engine oil: AMG M177 V8: 10,000 km / 12 months EU AMG maintenance; rec 8,000 km track use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per AMG maintenance schedule.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: 60,000 km / 48 months — Mercedes-AMG M177 service manual supplement (intake filter); https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v20711-2017/service has no AMG interval table.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; track days warrant more frequent bleeding.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Inspect at least every 20,000 km or before track use.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 40,000 km / 36 months — Mercedes-AMG M177 service manual supplement (spark plugs).
serviceNotes.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months (long-life coolant + 5-year time cap under high thermal load).
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: AMG SPEEDSHIFT MCT / 9G variant: preventive fluid ~60,000 km per specialist practice.
serviceNotes.rear axle differential oil: Rear axle / LSD fluid ~60,000 km preventive.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Supplementary exchange ~100,000 km under sustained high load.
serviceNotes.poly-V belt: Accessory belt ~80,000 km under high load.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: DI biturbo V8: inspect from ~80,000 km if idle or boost issues.

serviceSources.engine oil: 10,000 km / 12 months — Mercedes-AMG M177 service manual supplement (W213 E 63); https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v20711-2017/service has no AMG maintenance table
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-AMG W213; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W213 chassis reference)
serviceSources.engine air filter: 60,000 km / 48 months — Mercedes-AMG M177 service manual supplement (intake filter)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — AMG W213
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: 20,000 km — AMG high-performance brake inspection cadence
serviceSources.spark plugs: 40,000 km / 36 months — Mercedes-AMG M177 service manual supplement (spark plugs)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-AMG M177 service manual supplement (engine coolant renewal)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: AMG MCT / 9G preventive ATF ~60,000 km — specialist practice
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC+ transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: AWD front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear LSD / axle oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~100,000 km under sustained high load — specialist practice
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Accessory belt ~80,000 km — AMG accessory drive preventive interval
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: DI biturbo M177 — intake tract cleaning from ~80,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
